Mobile Apps

Lock-in contracts.

What we build

From MVPs to enterprise
platforms — we ship it all.

Every project is scoped tightly, priced fixed, and delivered iteratively.

01

Web Applications

Custom web apps built on React and Next.js. B2B portals, marketplaces, dashboards, internal tools. Server-rendered, fast, SEO-friendly.

ReactNext.jsTypeScriptREST / GraphQL
02

Mobile Apps

Native iOS and Android apps, or cross-platform with React Native. App Store / Play Store submission included.

iOS (Swift)Android (Kotlin)React NativeApp Store
03

Backend & APIs

Scalable Node.js, Python (FastAPI/Django), or PHP (Laravel) backends. RESTful APIs, webhooks, third-party integrations.

Node.jsPythonPHP / LaravelPostgreSQLMongoDB
04

E-commerce & Portals

Custom WooCommerce, Shopify, or bespoke e-commerce platforms. Multi-currency, multi-language, custom checkout flows.

WooCommerceShopifyCustomPayment gateways
Technology stack

We use the right tools,
not the trendy ones.

Proven, production-battle-tested technologies that your team can maintain and build on.

ReactNext.jsNode.jsPythonPHPLaraveliOS (Swift)Android (Kotlin)PostgreSQLMongoDBAWSDocker
